note: Curve Twocrypto-NG (CurveTwocryptoOptimized, 2-coin volatile) mainnet pools. All 8 are factory-deployed by the Curve Twocrypto-NG factory (0x98ee851a00abee0d95d08cf4ca2bdce32aeaaf7f, verified via each pool's factory()), so they are genuine Curve twocrypto contracts; the pool name()s read 'Yield Basis …' because the Yield Basis product deployed + uses them (crvUSD/BTC & crvUSD/ETH, 4 collaterals × 2 generations). These are the highest-TVL twocrypto-ng pools on mainnet (~$250M); the non-Yield-Basis twocrypto pools are all sub-$1M exotic-token pairs. Decode is curve_v2 swap/add/remove (0 core code; AmmVenue::CurveV2 reused from cryptoswap). 3 pools (cbBTC/WBTC/tBTC gen) carry the donation/policy/allowlist impl (86 fns); the WETH-gen pools are the base impl (82 fns) — a strict subset for the 8 user-facing functions, which are identical. Snapshot is the 86-fn superset (crvUSD/cbBTC pool). ScopeBall is a pre-sign INTENT decoder: a policy/allowlist gate is an execution detail, not a decode concern. 8 cover (exchange/add_liquidity/remove_liquidity/remove_liquidity_one_coin + receiver variants) · 16 exclude (2 exchange_received router-opt, 1 donation add_liquidity overload, 2 remove_liquidity_fixed_out, 3 erc20 LP, 8 admin).

0x5b41b908.reason: user exchange on CurveV2 twocrypto — 2-coin index value-map (swap/one_coin) or baked coins (add/remove); recipient = receiver arg if present else tx.from.

0x29b244bb.name: exchange_received(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256)
0x29b244bb.reason: router-only pre-funded swap optimization (tokens pre-transferred to the pool, no token-pull at this call); the swap intent is covered by exchange. NOT a new permission grant.

0x767691e7.name: exchange_received(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,address)
0x767691e7.reason: router-only pre-funded swap optimization (tokens pre-transferred to the pool, no token-pull at this call); the swap intent is covered by exchange. NOT a new permission grant.

0x86514738.name: add_liquidity(uint256[2],uint256,address,bool)
0x86514738.reason: donation-variant overload (4th bool arg = donation opt-in); the add_liquidity intent is covered by the 2-arg/3-arg overloads. The donation flag is a non-permission preference and only exists on the donation-variant pools.
